Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}※テスト※[cr][n]スクリプトから発行されたメッセージです。[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Doesn't seem like anyone's[n]trying to get a hold of me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm not feeling very well... I should[n]go to my room and get some rest.[n]{f 1 1}
